title: Manage application of agents to crops or pastures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage application of agents to crops or pastures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse application requirements

pcs.text: Determine goals for application of agents following a review of enterprise production plans and in consultation with land manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine goals for application of agents following a review of enterprise production plans and in consultation with land manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine goals for application of agents following a review of enterprise production plans and in consultation with land manager.

pcs.text: Access and review records of previous nutrition, pest, weed and disease management including the application of any agents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review records of previous nutrition, pest, weed and disease management including the application of any agents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review records of previous nutrition, pest, weed and disease management including the application of any agents.

pcs.text: Access and review relevant climate, environmental and geographic data from available information systems and sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review relevant climate, environmental and geographic data from available information systems and sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review relevant climate, environmental and geographic data from available information systems and sources.

pcs.text: Access and review yield monitoring data including yield variability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review yield monitoring data including yield variability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review yield monitoring data including yield variability.

pcs.text: Access and review relevant soil, plant and water information from tests and records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and review relevant soil, plant and water information from tests and records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and review relevant soil, plant and water information from tests and records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Analyse application requirements

elements.title: Develop an application plan

pcs.text: Identify performance targets and indicators in the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify performance targets and indicators in the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify performance targets and indicators in the production plan.

pcs.text: Select appropriate agent/s, including adjuvants, method of application and equipment based on site analysis, recommendations, production requirements, environmental conditions and manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate agent/s, including adjuvants, method of application and equipment based on site analysis, recommendations, production requirements, environmental conditions and manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate agent/s, including adjuvants, method of application and equipment based on site analysis, recommendations, production requirements, environmental conditions and manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Select spray nozzles to achieve the optimum droplet size with minimal variation and deliver the appropriate liquid flow rate for the selected agent in the desired spray distribution pattern
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select spray nozzles to achieve the optimum droplet size with minimal variation and deliver the appropriate liquid flow rate for the selected agent in the desired spray distribution pattern?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select spray nozzles to achieve the optimum droplet size with minimal variation and deliver the appropriate liquid flow rate for the selected agent in the desired spray distribution pattern.

pcs.text: Determine and monitor measures to control factors influencing the level of spray drift
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and monitor measures to control factors influencing the level of spray drift?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and monitor measures to control factors influencing the level of spray drift.

pcs.text: Determine procedures to ensure compliance with the range of appropriate commonwealth, state and local government legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine procedures to ensure compliance with the range of appropriate commonwealth, state and local government legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine procedures to ensure compliance with the range of appropriate commonwealth, state and local government legislation and regulations.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement appropriate controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement appropriate controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement appropriate controls.

pcs.text: Determine environmental impacts of application and implement appropriate clean up strategies to the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine environmental impacts of application and implement appropriate clean up strategies to the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine environmental impacts of application and implement appropriate clean up strategies to the area.

pcs.text: Schedule applications taking the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors into consideration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule applications taking the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors into consideration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule applications taking the range of seasonal, geographic and resourcing factors into consideration.

pcs.text: Record details of applications, as required by legislation, regulations and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of applications, as required by legislation, regulations and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of applications, as required by legislation, regulations and codes of practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop an application plan

elements.title: Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of the application plan

pcs.text: Evaluate the effectiveness of the application at key points and make adjustments to ensure appropriate coverage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the effectiveness of the application at key points and make adjustments to ensure appropriate coverage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the effectiveness of the application at key points and make adjustments to ensure appropriate coverage.

pcs.text: Monitor and assess environmental impacts and work health and safety hazards relating to application strategies throughout the implementation process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess environmental impacts and work health and safety hazards relating to application strategies throughout the implementation process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess environmental impacts and work health and safety hazards relating to application strategies throughout the implementation process.

pcs.text: Make modifications to the plan as and when necessary to address environmental, work health and safety, resourcing or effectiveness issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make modifications to the plan as and when necessary to address environmental, work health and safety, resourcing or effectiveness issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make modifications to the plan as and when necessary to address environmental, work health and safety, resourcing or effectiveness issues.

pcs.text: Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the application plan against the plan to assess effectiveness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the application plan against the plan to assess effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data, observations and documentation from the implementation of the application plan against the plan to assess effectiveness.

pcs.text: Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare recommendations for future strategies based on the analysis of the data.

pcs.text: Record details of the implementation including information on any difficulties or issues faced, technical details, environmental and work health and safety issues, recommendations for future action, results, costs and any available data analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of the implementation including information on any difficulties or issues faced, technical details, environmental and work health and safety issues, recommendations for future action, results, costs and any available data analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of the implementation including information on any difficulties or issues faced, technical details, environmental and work health and safety issues, recommendations for future action, results, costs and any available data analysis.
